appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for the web browser surface, including local-only navigation, no-refresh constraints, and headed-mode/WebGL considerations.

executionNotes: Task-based flow validator launches failed because the configured custom model name resolved to invalid model custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3, so the main validator executed the frontend-refactor browser and code-audit flows directly and wrote the equivalent flow reports.
Headless Chromium could not create a WebGL context for react-globe.gl, so globe validation was completed in a headed browser session where the 3D globe rendered successfully.
